intro.label: 1_intro_C.mp4
intro.subtitle: Hi, my name is Emily and today we'll be conducting your job interview together. Please make yourself comfortable.

q1_video.label: 2_Q1_interested_in.mp4
q1_video.subtitle: What is the position you are interested in?

q2_video.label: 3_Q2_academic_background.mp4
q2_video.subtitle: Let's start by talking about your academic background. What is your major?

q3_video.label: 4_Q3_responsibilities_Good.mp4
q3_video.subtitle: Tell me about some responsibilities you have had at school, work or during internships.

q4_video.label: 5_Q4_activities.mp4
q4_video.subtitle: What activities are you interested in doing outside of school or work?

q5_video.label: 6_Q5_good_at.mp4
q5_video.subtitle: What are you good at and what skills do you feel confident about using in a professional environment?

q6_video.label: 7_Q6_teamwork_C.mp4
q6_video.subtitle: Have you ever worked on a project that required teamwork? Tell me what you have done.

q7_video.label: 8_Q7_tasks.mp4
q7_video.subtitle: What kind of tasks are you capable of doing independently?

finish.label: 30_wonderful_day.mp4
finish.subtitle: Thank you very much for your time today, it was a pleasure speaking with you and we'll be in touch. Have a wonderful day.

profanity_warning.label: 26_be_respectful.mp4
profanity_warning.subtitle: Please use respectful language during the interview. Let's return to the interview questions.

profanity_warning_c.label: 26_be_respectful_C.mp4
profanity_warning_c.subtitle: Please use respectful language during the interview. Let's return to the interview questions.

english_warning.label: 40_english.mp4
english_warning.subtitle: Oh, would you mind saying it in English?

english_practice.label: 41_no_spanish.mp4
english_practice.subtitle: I do understand Spanish, but you are here to practice English language!

off_topic_1.label: 42_off_topic_1.mp4
off_topic_1.subtitle: We can come back later to that topic. For now let's focus on the main objective, please.

off_topic_2.label: 43_off_topic_2.mp4
off_topic_2.subtitle: That's an interesting topic. For now let's focus on the main objective, please.

interviewFlow.title: Emily Interview Coach - Seven Question Flow

questions.question: What is the position you are interested in?

questions.placeholder: Example: I am interested in working as a lawyer.

questions.question: What is your major?

acceptablePatterns: i have a bachelor's degree in
i have a bachelor degree in

questions.question: Tell me about some responsibilities you have had at school, work or during internships.
questions.hint: Mention one responsibility you have had at school, work, or internships.
questions.caption: Tell me about some responsibilities you have had at school, work or during internships.
questions.modelingAnswer: I have been responsible for organizing school activities.
questions.placeholder: Example: I have been responsible for organizing school activities.
questions.audio: Tell me about some responsibilities you have had at school, work or during internships.

acceptablePatterns: i have been in charge of

profanity.hint: Answer respectfully and describe one responsibility.
profanity.caption: Tell me about some responsibilities you have had at school, work or during internships.
profanity.modelingAnswer: I have helped organize projects at school.

spanish_detected.hint: Use English to describe one responsibility.
spanish_detected.caption: Tell me about some responsibilities you have had at school, work or during internships.
spanish_detected.modelingAnswer: I have been responsible for organizing events.

off_topic_1.hint: Mention tasks you have done at school, work, or internships.
off_topic_1.caption: Tell me about some responsibilities you have had at school, work or during internships.
off_topic_1.modelingAnswer: I have helped prepare reports at school.
off_topic_1.statusText: Let's focus on the interview question.
off_topic_1.feedbackText: Let's return to the interview question.

off_topic_2.hint: Describe one responsibility you have had.
off_topic_2.caption: Tell me about some responsibilities you have had at school, work or during internships.
off_topic_2.statusText: Let's focus on the interview question.

off_topic_3.hint: Answer with a real responsibility from school or work.
off_topic_3.caption: Tell me about some responsibilities you have had at school, work or during internships.
off_topic_3.modelingAnswer: I have been responsible for preparing presentations.
off_topic_3.statusText: Let's focus on the interview question.

questions.question: What activities are you interested in doing outside of school or work?
questions.hint: Mention activities or hobbies you enjoy outside of school or work.
questions.caption: What activities are you interested in doing outside of school or work?
questions.modelingAnswer: I am interested in playing soccer and listening to music.
questions.placeholder: Example: I am interested in playing soccer and listening to music.
questions.audio: What activities are you interested in doing outside of school or work?

profanity.hint: Answer respectfully and mention activities you enjoy.
profanity.caption: What activities are you interested in doing outside of school or work?
profanity.modelingAnswer: I am interested in reading books and exercising.

spanish_detected.hint: Use English to describe your hobbies or interests.
spanish_detected.caption: What activities are you interested in doing outside of school or work?
spanish_detected.modelingAnswer: I am interested in playing soccer.

off_topic_1.caption: What activities are you interested in doing outside of school or work?

off_topic_1.statusText: Let's focus on the interview question.
off_topic_1.feedbackText: Let's return to the interview question.

off_topic_2.hint: Describe hobbies or activities you enjoy outside school or work.
off_topic_2.caption: What activities are you interested in doing outside of school or work?

off_topic_2.statusText: Let's focus on the interview question.

off_topic_3.hint: Answer with hobbies or activities you enjoy.

questions.question: What are you good at and what skills do you feel confident about using in a professional environment?
questions.hint: Mention skills or abilities you feel confident about.
questions.caption: What are you good at and what skills do you feel confident about using in a professional environment?
questions.modelingAnswer: I am good at teamwork and communication.
questions.placeholder: Example: I am good at teamwork and communication.
questions.audio: What are you good at and what skills do you feel confident about using in a professional environment?

profanity.hint: Answer respectfully and describe your skills.
profanity.caption: What are you good at and what skills do you feel confident about using in a professional environment?
profanity.modelingAnswer: I am good at communication and teamwork.

spanish_detected.hint: Use English to describe your strengths and skills.
spanish_detected.caption: What are you good at and what skills do you feel confident about using in a professional environment?
spanish_detected.modelingAnswer: I am good at math and problem-solving.

off_topic_1.hint: Mention abilities or strengths related to school, work, or communication.
off_topic_1.caption: What are you good at and what skills do you feel confident about using in a professional environment?
off_topic_1.modelingAnswer: I am good at teamwork and organization.
off_topic_1.statusText: Let's focus on the interview question.
off_topic_1.feedbackText: Let's return to the interview question.

off_topic_2.hint: Describe skills you feel confident using professionally.
off_topic_2.caption: What are you good at and what skills do you feel confident about using in a professional environment?
off_topic_2.modelingAnswer: I feel confident about communication and leadership skills.
off_topic_2.statusText: Let's focus on the interview question.

off_topic_3.hint: Answer with your professional skills or strengths.
off_topic_3.caption: What are you good at and what skills do you feel confident about using in a professional environment?

questions.question: Have you ever worked on a project that required teamwork? Tell me what you have done.
questions.hint: Mention a project where you worked with other people.
questions.caption: Have you ever worked on a project that required teamwork? Tell me what you have done.
questions.modelingAnswer: I worked on a school project with my classmates.
questions.placeholder: Example: I worked on a school project with my classmates.
questions.audio: Have you ever worked on a project that required teamwork? Tell me what you have done.

profanity.hint: Answer respectfully and describe a teamwork experience.
profanity.caption: Have you ever worked on a project that required teamwork? Tell me what you have done.
profanity.modelingAnswer: I worked with my classmates on a presentation.

spanish_detected.hint: Use English to describe a teamwork project.
spanish_detected.caption: Have you ever worked on a project that required teamwork? Tell me what you have done.
spanish_detected.modelingAnswer: I worked on a school project with my classmates.

off_topic_1.hint: Mention a project where you worked with a team.
off_topic_1.caption: Have you ever worked on a project that required teamwork? Tell me what you have done.
off_topic_1.modelingAnswer: I worked with my classmates on a group presentation.
off_topic_1.statusText: Let's focus on the interview question.
off_topic_1.feedbackText: Let's return to the interview question.

off_topic_2.hint: Describe a teamwork project and your role in it.
off_topic_2.caption: Have you ever worked on a project that required teamwork? Tell me what you have done.
off_topic_2.modelingAnswer: I helped organize tasks during a group project.
off_topic_2.statusText: Let's focus on the interview question.

off_topic_3.hint: Answer with a real teamwork experience.
off_topic_3.caption: Have you ever worked on a project that required teamwork? Tell me what you have done.
off_topic_3.modelingAnswer: I worked with a team to prepare a presentation.
off_topic_3.statusText: Let's focus on the interview question.

questions.question: What kind of tasks are you capable of doing independently?
questions.hint: Mention tasks you can complete independently.
questions.caption: What kind of tasks are you capable of doing independently?
questions.modelingAnswer: I am capable of organizing documents independently.
questions.placeholder: Example: I am capable of organizing documents independently.
questions.audio: What kind of tasks are you capable of doing independently?

profanity.hint: Answer respectfully and describe tasks you can do independently.
profanity.caption: What kind of tasks are you capable of doing independently?
profanity.modelingAnswer: I am capable of managing tasks independently.

spanish_detected.hint: Use English to describe tasks you can complete independently.
spanish_detected.caption: What kind of tasks are you capable of doing independently?
spanish_detected.modelingAnswer: I am capable of working independently on projects.

off_topic_1.hint: Mention tasks you can complete by yourself.
off_topic_1.caption: What kind of tasks are you capable of doing independently?
off_topic_1.modelingAnswer: I am capable of organizing information independently.
off_topic_1.statusText: Let's focus on the interview question.
off_topic_1.feedbackText: Let's return to the interview question.

off_topic_2.hint: Describe tasks or responsibilities you can manage independently.
off_topic_2.caption: What kind of tasks are you capable of doing independently?
off_topic_2.modelingAnswer: I can complete administrative tasks independently.
off_topic_2.statusText: Let's focus on the interview question.

off_topic_3.hint: Answer with tasks you can perform independently.
off_topic_3.caption: What kind of tasks are you capable of doing independently?
off_topic_3.modelingAnswer: I am capable of managing projects independently.
